/usr/bin/c++ -std=c++17 -fno-omit-frame-pointer -ffp-contract=off  -moutline-atomics -march=armv8-a+crc -Wall -Wextra -Wformat-security -Wvla -Wundef -Wmissing-format-attribute -Woverloaded-virtual -Wcast-qual -Wimplicit-fallthrough=5 -Wstringop-truncation  -Wmissing-include-dirs -Wextra-semi -Wlogical-op -Werror -DSAFE_MUTEX -DENABLED_DEBUG_SYNC -g -Wl,--export-dynamic -rdynamic  -Wl,--build-id=sha1 CMakeFiles/gcs_xcom_xcom_base-t.dir/xcom/gcs_xcom_xcom_base-t.cc.o -o ../../../runtime_output_directory/gcs_xcom_xcom_base-t  ../libgunit_small.a ../../../plugin/group_replication/libmysqlgcs/libmysqlgcs.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmysys.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libstrings.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libmytime.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libzlib.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libzstd.a -lm /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so ../../../archive_output_directory/libbacktrace.a ../../../libgmock.a ../../../libgtest.a ../../../archive_output_directory/liblz4_lib.a ../../../archive_output_directory/libxxhash_lib.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/libtirpc.so
